65 E1E E1E_SELF_DEPER 21e(E1e)Self Depreciation CHAR 1 Indicates the frequency of self depreciation the patient expressed. Examples include: "I am nothing."; "I am of no use to anyone." -1 = Unknown, -2 = Space, 0 = Indicator not exhitied in last 30 days, 1 = Indicator of this type exhibited up to five
